---
title: "Check for coding discrepancies" 
author: "Kendra Wyant"
date: "`r lubridate::today()`"
format: 
  html: 
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true 
    toc_depth: 4
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---   

## Notes

This file checks codes by Ella and Kendra for discrepancies and saves out all discrepant comments for a third coder to review (Claire).


## Set up
```{r}
#| include: false


library(tidyverse) 
library(janitor)

devtools::source_url("https://github.com/jjcurtin/lab_support/blob/main/format_path.R?raw=true")

path_burden <- format_path("/risk2/data_processed/burden2")
```

## Read in data

```{r}
coder_1 <- read_csv(file.path(path_burden, "coded_comments_1_200_KW.csv"),
                          show_col_types = FALSE)
coder_2 <- read_csv(file.path(path_burden, "coded_comments_1_200_EL.csv"),
                          show_col_types = FALSE)
```

Check for notes
```{r}
coder_1 |> 
  filter(!is.na(data_source_inaccuracies)) |> 
  select(comment_num, data_source_inaccuracies) 
```

Remove comment_num 62 
```{r}
coder_1 <- coder_1 |> 
  filter(comment_num != 62)

coder_2 <- coder_2 |> 
  filter(comment_num != 62)
```



## Compare codes
```{r}
disc_code <- coder_1 |> 
  select(-data_source_inaccuracies) |> 
  anti_join(coder_2) |> 
  glimpse()
```

```{r}
coder_1 |> 
  filter(comment_num %in% disc_code$comment_num) |>
  view()
```

```{r}
coder_2 |> 
  filter(comment_num %in% disc_code$comment_num) |>
  view()
```


## Write out discrepant codes for 3rd coder
```{r}
disc_code[5:11] <- NA

disc_code |> 
  write_csv(file.path(path_burden, "coded_comments_1_200_CP.csv"))
```
